title: U.K. government plans to allow airlines to consolidate flights as jet fuel costs soar
summary_full: The government says it wants to reduce the likelihood of last-minute flight cancelations over the summer amid uncertainty over the Iran war.
summary_public: The government says it wants to reduce the likelihood of last-minute flight cancelations over the summer amid uncertainty over the Iran war.
